question: Show the names and ratings of the top 3 players from Guinea Bissau whose preferred foot is Right.
gold_sql: SELECT name, rating FROM players WHERE nationality = 'Guinea Bissau' AND preffered_foot = 'Right' ORDER BY rating DESC LIMIT 3;

question: List the player names in clubs table entry Well. Phoenix with rating above 74.
gold_sql: SELECT p.name FROM players AS p JOIN clubs AS c ON p.club = c.name WHERE c.name = 'Well. Phoenix' AND p.rating > 74;

question: Find the average rating of players for each club and return the top 10 clubs.
gold_sql: SELECT club, AVG(rating) AS avg_rating FROM players GROUP BY club ORDER BY avg_rating DESC LIMIT 10;
